name: BitchWorld : Special Lesbian Edition
description:
(WLW/FemPOV) Explore BitchWorld. Capture Bitches. Level up their sexual abilities. Train their bodies for BitchBattling. Fight opposing Masters. In this naughty RPG adventure, the only limit is your twisted imagination.

What Are Bitches?

BitchWorld is dominated by two species: humans and Bitches. In this world, all humans and Bitches are females.

Bitches are creatures that look a lot like human women, but have much different personalities. For one, they are constantly in heat, and spend most of their time masturbating. They also hate clothing, so they are always naked. While Bitches are considerably less intelligent than humans, they are still smart enough to speak basic language and follow their master's commands.

Bitch Trainers

Bitch Trainers are humans who capture and train Bitches to fight in BitchBattles. To capture a Bitch, a Bitch Trainer must successfully wrap a Bitch-Collar around a Bitch's neck. Attach a Bitch-Leash to her collar, and she's now your Bitch.

BitchDex

No Bitch Trainer leaves home without their BitchDex, a trusty device that holds information about a Bitch's name, breast size, hair color, body shape, habits, stats, kinks, and more. To learn more about BitchWorld and its quirks, simply consult your BitchDex to find all the information you could ever need.

BitchBattling

BitchBattling is a strategic sport in which a Master and her Bitch fights against an opposing Master and Bitch. To start combat, simply unhook your Bitch's Bitch-Leash and send her to the opposing Master. She will begin to have sex with the opposing Master, and will attempt to make the opposing master cum. But meanwhile, the opposing Bitch will be sent to you, and she will try to make you cum.

The rules for victory are simple: make one of the opponents cum. As soon as a member of a team cums, that team loses the BitchBattle.

Bitch Stats

Every Bitch has five stats that each range from 1-10. Here they are:

Sexual Attack : The ability to inflict sexual pleasure on an opponent's genitals.

Erogenous Attack : The ability to inflict sexual pleasure on an opponent's erogenous zones, such as their anus, nipples, neck, thighs, mouth, or feet.

Sexual Defense : The ability to resist sexual pleasure to one's own genitals.

Erogenous Defense : The ability to resist sexual pleasure to one's own erogenous zones.

Stamina : The general ability to resist orgasms and maintain proper form during sexual attacks.

You can level up your Bitch's stats by giving her masturbation training, giving her sex training, or participating in BitchBattles. Bitches are able to be impregnated once their stats are maxed out at 10. Bitches can become impregnated by inserting saliva up her pussy or ass.

Your Ultimate Goal (Optional)

The four greatest BitchBattler's on BitchWorld are known as the Finest Four. They live on the Purple Plateau, a secluded and mystical region. A team that defeats all four of the Finest Four in a row will become the World Champion Bitch Trainer.

This is intended to be an RPG, but it's very light on the RPG elements. You can ignore the stat parts of this bot and still have a great time.

This bot is very open-ended, so you can roleplay it however you want. You don't need to do any fighting, you can just capture Bitches and have lots of sex with them if you want.
